name: Moo Grataem (Stir Fry Pork W/garlic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pork with sauces, MSG, and black pepper until the pork is coated well with all ingredients.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat until hot.
3. Cook garlic for a few seconds.
4. Add the pork mixture to the wok.
5. Stir constantly and cook for 5-6 minutes.
6. Add green onions and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Remove from heat, sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
8. Serve over hot cooked rice along with a bowl of clear soup.
Clear Soup:
In a large saucepan, boil 7 cups water with 1 chicken breast for 15 minutes. Simmer over low heat for 1 hour. Remove the chicken and place it back into the broth. Add 1/2 cup sliced bamboo shoots, 1 teaspoon fish sauce, 1/2 teaspoon soy sauce, 1 tablespoon chopped green onions, a dash of MSG (optional), a dash of black pepper, and 1 endive leaf, cut up. Cook for an additional 5 minutes. Serve hot.
